series_metadata.series_description: Record consists of the Donor Registry Enrollment form (BMV 3346) or comparable documents provided by Organ Procurement Organizations (OPO). The forms may contain the person''s full name, address, city, state, zip code, date of birth, social security number, and driver license number.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned into CPIC database and verified ; Electronic: in CPIC database fulfilled or revoked
